meaning: n.(第二次世界大战期间德国空军使用的) 梅塞施米特式战斗机(尤指 ME109 型)
examples: This 1941 aircraft design was to be a possible successor to the Messerschmitt Bf 110 heavy fighter.
Here, we compared Germany's Messerschmitt ME-109 to the Allied planes, America's P-40 and the British Spitfire.
Messerschmitt and Heinkel, forbidden to ply their former trade of building military aircraft, turned to bubble cars as a peacetime alternative.
The Messerschmitt was 100mph faster than the Mustang and on paper looked like a winner.
He had German firm Messerschmitt Bolkow Blohm develop ultralight planes, but scrapped them when he discovered the bodies were too heavy.
